_Nike.name: NIKE AIR FORCE 1 LOW SNEAKERS
_Nike.description:
Nike Air Force 1 low-top sneakers — classic white leather cupsole trainer.

Key features:
• Premium white leather upper.
• Iconic AF1 low silhouette.
• Rubber cupsole with pivot tread.
• Padded collar for comfort.
• Streetwear and casual staple.

Available EU sizes 40–46. Styled at Prince Esquire for everyday casual wear.

Available EU sizes 40–46. Styled at Prince Esquire for everyday casual wear.
